title: 4 Pack Thin Clear Flexible Plastic Kitchen Cutting Board 12 Inch x 15 Inch
description:
Tired of your old useless cutting boards? Try this new flexible cutting board! Great surface for cutting and preparing fish, carving meat, slicing fruits and vegetables. And it protects the countertops during food preparation. Best of all its dishwasher safe! This universal cutting board can also be used as a cutting surface for arts and craft projects, quilting and more! It rolls up for quick and easy storage and has a hole at the top for hanging.
